title: EU AI Act - Research snapshot
notable_actions: Digital Omnibus proposal (EC) adopted 19 Nov 2025 proposing to adjust timeline for high-risk requirements
Commission guidance deadlines (e.g., practical implementation guidelines) had publication target by 2026-02-02; status: mixed/delayed as of Mar 2026
notes: This snapshot used multiple independent sources (European Commission pages, EUR-Lex, legal analysis and press). Timing for implementation of high-risk obligations remains subject to change (Digital Omnibus) and availability of harmonised standards; national enforcement capacity is still being built.
